title: Rename project from Pecan to Beskid
body:
Renamed the project from **Pecan** to **Beskid** across documentation, crate names where applicable, and workspace configuration—preserving git history under the old `pekan` remote until the repo was later deleted.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`1d49ce5`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/1d49ce5)
- **Subject:** Rename project from Pecan to Beskid across all documentation and workspace configuration
- **Completed:** 2026-02-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `project-structure`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-tooling-research`

## Relation
Brand and naming alignment before the compiler submodule split and public superrepo messaging; closes the “Pecan prototype” narrative while v0.0 catalog still labels the band historically. Subsequent delivery bands use **Beskid** naming; seed tasks retain `source.repo: "pekan"` for provenance.

source.subject: Rename project from Pecan to Beskid across all documentation and workspace configuration
